channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs SUV électriques en 2026 ? Notre sélection
item.description: Besoin d'une voiture familiale, spacieuse et confortable ? Optez pour un SUV. Nous avons testé et rassemblé ici les meilleurs SUV électriques du marché.

item.title: The MacBook Neo just keeps winning — repair costs beat Air, teardown looks simple, and now I want it even more
item.description: Apple's new MacBook Neo is collecting praise, and we're learning more about its build and even the costs of repairs — and it's looking more attractive all the time.

item.title: L’astuce géniale du Oppo Find N6 pour faire disparaître le pli de l’écran des smartphones pliables
item.description: Vous sentez ce petit creux sous votre doigt quand vous utilisez un smartphone pliable ? Oppo prétend l'avoir fait disparaître sur le Find N6 grâce à de l'impression 3D liquide.

item.title: OpenAI’s Sora video generator is reportedly coming to ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI's Sora video generator could soon become a built-in feature in ChatGPT, as reported by The Information. Sora is currently only available on its website or as a standalone app, which has fallen shy of the popularity of ChatGPT. This update would allow users to access Sora's video generation capabilities directly within ChatGPT itself, much […]...

item.title: Hacker broke into FBI and compromised Epstein files, report says
item.description: According to a Reuters report, a foreign hacker broke into a server that was part of the FBI’s investigation into Jeffrey Epstein — without realizing they had hacked an FBI server.

item.title: This mobile controller is less than a third of the price of a Switch 2 and turns your phone into a portable gaming machine
item.description: The Razer Kishi V3 Pro is an excellent mobile controller, and it's never been cheaper at Amazon.

item.title: 'Some of the best 4K Blu-rays I've ever tested' — Gruv is having a 3 for $39 4K Blu-ray sale, and I've picked the 6 best discs, all of which I've personally tested
item.description: Gruv's 3 for $39 4K Blu-ray sale is incredible value and it features some of the best 4K discs I've tested!

item.title: WordPress debuts a private workspace that runs in your browser via a new service, my.WordPress.net
item.description: WordPress’s new browser-based service lets users create private sites without hosting or signup, turning the platform into a personal workspace for writing, research, and AI tools.

item.title: A Pill for Sleep Apnea? Clinical Trial Yields Promising Results
item.description: An old anti-seizure drug might also work to reduce apnea episodes, recent trial data has shown.

item.title: Most AI chatbots will help users plan violent attacks, study finds
item.description: Eight of the 10 most popular AI chatbots were willing to help plan violent attacks when tested by researchers, according to a new study from the Center for Countering Digital Hate (CCDH), in partnership with CNN. While both Snapchat's My AI and Claude refused to assist with violence the majority of the time, only Anthropic's Claude "reliably discouraged" these hypothetical attackers during testing. Researchers created accounts posing as 13-year-old boys and tested ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, Meta AI, DeepSeek, Perplexity, Snapchat My AI, Character.AI and Replika across 18 scenarios betwe...

item.title: Ce robot Ecovacs lave vos vitres jusque dans les coins et chute sous les 400 € pendant les ventes flash d’Amazon
item.description: Si vous rêvez d'avoir des vitres vraiment propres, sans bouger le petit doigt, alors il vous faut un laveur de vitres. Testé et approuvé, le modèle Ecovacs Winbot W2S fait partie des plus recommandables, d'autant plus qu'il est moins cher que d'habitude pendant les ventes flash de printemps d'Amazon : on le trouve ainsi à 398,99 euros au lieu de 449 euros. ...

item.title: Google will stop at nothing to get you to sign up to YouTube Premium — and its unskippable 30-second ads could be the final straw
item.description: Google is cracking down on more ads for YouTube's TV app, so a YouTube Premium subscription could become essential.

item.title: 'We’ve got 5.5 million beautiful individually tested pixels' — Disney Adventure’s giant screen turns the middle of the ship into an immersive stage
item.description: Disney Imagineers packed a 5.5-million-pixel screen, 2,400 hidden speakers, and a flying performer system into the Disney Adventure’s central stage — all while staying within strict cruise ship weight limits.

item.title: The Full Trailer for ‘Obsession’ Might Just Ruin Your Day
item.description: 'Be careful who you wish for,' reads the tagline of the new film from Curry Barker, out May 15.

item.title: The PS Plus Games Catalog is getting Space Marine 2 and Persona 5 Royal in March
item.description: Sony has announced its latest additions to the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog. While they might not top last month's introduction of Marvel's Spider-Man 2, Extra and Premium subscribers are still getting access to some notable games. In March, the new additions include Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 (PS5), one of Engadget's picks for the Best Games of 2024, and Persona 5 Royal (PS5 and PS4). The PS4 version of Persona 5 Royal – Ultimate Edition, the complete version of one of Atlus' most popular RPGs, will also be available alongside a collection of other fun additions.Warhammer 40,000: Space...

item.title: HPE warns of dangerous security flaw which could allow Aruba OS password resets
item.description: HPE says it fixed five major flaws recently, including one deemed 'critical'.

item.title: Best Mattress for Back Pain (2026): Saatva, Bear, Helix
item.description: If you're struggling with chronic back or shoulder pain, these mattresses could change your life

item.title: This Amazon mini PC deal packs an Intel Core i5, 32GB RAM and 1TB SSD for under $500
item.description: The Kamrui Pinova P2 mini PC packs a 12-core Intel Core i5-12600H processor, 32GB of DDR4 RAM, and a fast 1TB NVMe SSD into a compact desktop system.

item.title: A Foreign Hacker Accessed FBI Files on Epstein Back in 2023: Report
item.description: The FBI claimed that the “cyber incident" was ”an isolated one.”

item.title: Rivian spin-out Mind Robotics raises $500M for industrial AI-powered robots
item.description: The startup, which was created by Rivian founder RJ Scaringe, is looking to train on data from, and deploy in, Rivian's factory.

item.title: Google's Gemini Embedding 2 arrives with native multimodal support to cut costs and speed up your enterprise data stack
item.description: Yesterday amid a flurry of enterprise AI product updates, Google announced arguably its most significant one for enterprise customers: the public preview availability of Gemini Embedding 2, its new embeddings model — a significant evolution in how machines represent and retrieve information across different media types. While previous embedding models were largely restricted to text, this new model natively integrates text, images, video, audio, and documents into a single numerical space — reducing latency by as much as 70% for some customers and reducing total cost for enterprises who use AI...

item.title: Troisième hausse consécutive en trois mois pour la RAM et le stockage chez Framework
item.description: Si vous comptiez ajouter de la RAM à votre ordinateur portable, j'ai une mauvaise nouvelle. Le marché de la mémoire est en plein délire. Framework, pourtant adepte de la transparence totale, vient de doucher nos espoirs en annonçant une troisième hausse consécutive. Mais c'est loin d'être la seule mauvaise nouvelle.

item.title: Fortnite's original Save the World mode will be free to play starting on April 16
item.description:
Fortnite's original Save the World game mode will be free to play beginning on April 16. This is not the battle royale mode that went on to take over the world, but rather a PvE co-op campaign that focuses on crafting and survival. It currently costs $9 but that ends soon. As a matter of fact, Epic Games will stop selling the paid version of the content tonight, March 11, at 8PM ET. If you have $9 burning a hole in your pocket to spend on something that'll be free next month, go for it. Current players will still be able to access the content, so there are no worries there.
Once the free vers...

item.title: I wear Anker's budget noise-canceling headphones every day for work—and they just hit a ridiculously low price
item.description: My wife hates trying to talk to me when I've got these ANC Soundcore Q20i's on at work.

item.title: Manufact raises $6.3M as MCP becomes the ‘USB-C for AI’ powering ChatGPT and Claude apps
item.description: For decades, software companies designed their products for a single type of customer: a human being staring at a screen. Every button, menu, and dashboard existed to translate a person’s intention into a machine’s action. But a small startup based in San Francisco and Zurich believes that era is ending — and that the future belongs to companies that build software not for people, but for the artificial intelligence agents that increasingly act on their behalf.Manufact, a three-person company that emerged from Y Combinator’s Summer 2025 batch, announced in February that it raised $6.3 million ...

item.title: This Ryzen 3 4300U mini PC deal is a steal under £255 in Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale - and it comes with 16GB RAM and a fast 512GB SSD
item.description: NiPoGi Pinova P1 mini PC packs an AMD Ryzen 3 4300U processor, 16GB of DDR4 RAM, and a fast 512GB M.2 SSD into a compact desktop system.

item.title: Alternative app store AltStore PAL is joining the fediverse
item.description: AltStore PAL, the alternative iOS app store available in the European Union and Japan, is joining the social web. In a post on Wednesday, AltStore PAL announced that users across Mastodon, Threads, and Bluesky can now interact with apps that developers choose to federate on its explore.alt.store website. Any likes from the social web will […]

item.title: 'Stay tuned': Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse producers drop a big hint that they might be ready to show us some footage — and say they're 'very confident' it'll meet its release date
item.description: Phil Lord and Chris Miller have insisted that the Spider-Verse film trilogy's final entry won't be delayed again.

item.title: Singles in the workplace are ignored by family-friendly policies. Here’s how employers can fix that
item.description: Workers who are single, such as recent graduates widowers, now represent much more of the labor pool than they did a generation ago. In 1960, 72% of adults were married, and over 90% would go on to marry. HR policies and management practices back then catered to nuclear families with a lone, male breadwinner.

item.title: Microsoft Backs Anthropic in Pentagon Fallout Despite Heated Rivalry
item.description: Microsoft is asking for a pause on the "supply-chain risk" designation.

item.title: À moins de 9 000 euros, cette nouvelle voiture électrique chinoise a tout pour détruire le marché européen
item.description: C'est en Chine, mais regardez ces chiffres. Pour le prix d'une petite occasion fatiguée chez nous, Chery propose une voiture neuve avec 420 km d'autonomie (CLTC) et une puce Snapdragon avec un grand écran central.

item.title: Asus routers hijacked to power dangerous cybercrime proxy network - here's what we know
item.description: KadNap is being used to create Doppelgänger, a network with 14,000+ devices targeting Asus routers.

item.title: I've said it before, and I'm saying it again — do not overlook this underrated gaming audio accessory that can transform and hugely enhance your setup
item.description: External sound cards are a supremely underrated gaming accessory that can enhance your experience immensely - and one of my favorites is discounted right now.

item.title: I switched from a cordless vac to corded, and I'll never go back — here are 4 models I recommend buying at Amazon's spring sale
item.description: I've started valuing the power over the convenience of a cordless vac, especially since I started cleaning carpets more often

item.title: PS Plus Extra et Premium en mars 2026 : Warhammer 40,000, Persona, Blasphemous, Tekken… Voici les jeux offerts ce mois-ci
item.description: Les jeux offerts aux abonnés Extra et Premium du PlayStation Plus viennent de tomber ! Entre une plongée dans le vaste univers de Warhammer 40,000, le dernier chapitre de Persona ou exploration des mines de la Moria, qu'est-ce qui vous parle le plus ?

item.title: Amazon dans le rétro : cette borne d’arcade Sega Astro City avec ses 22 jeux et son écran vertical est à -38% pour les Ventes Flash de Printemps
item.description: La Sega Astro City Mini V est une borne d'arcade de bureau à écran vertical (d'où le V) centrée sur les shmups et comprenant 22 jeux à découvrir pour 104,97 euros au lieu de 169,99 euros.

item.title: ‘There’s no going back’ — still thinking of quitting ChatGPT? Make sure you do these 3 things first
item.description: People quitting ChatGPT after OpenAI’s Pentagon deal should export their data, copy their memories, and delete their chats before closing their account.

item.title: Anthropic’s Pentagon showdown is drawing Silicon Valley into a larger fight
item.description: Top researchers and major tech companies are lining up behind Anthropic after the Defense Department blacklisted the firm, turning a contract dispute into a broader battle over government leverage. The dispute between Anthropic and the Department of Defense is quickly becoming a broader test of how far the government can go in policing AI companies’ policies—and how much support those companies can rally from the wider research community....

item.title: ‘Chainsaw Man’ Fans Are Freaking Out That the Manga Might Be Suddenly Over
item.description: Fan theories are abound, thanks to contrasting versions of the latest chapter of 'Chainsaw Man' and its final page.

item.title: Claude is down for many — here's what we know as Anthropic says it's 'investigating' an issue
item.description: Having Claude issues? You're not alone — Anthropic says it's investigating an "active issue".

item.title: Business landscape is about to undergo a seismic transformation driven by AI agents
item.description: AI agents are evolving. We are now advancing towards autonomous AI agents.

item.title: EV startup Harbinger reveals a smaller work truck with electric and hybrid variants
item.description: The LA-based startup is trying to corner the commercial truck market with its electric and hybrid trucks that offer a lower cost of ownership and a better driving experience.

item.title: Rabbit's Cyberdeck is a modern take on a netbook
item.description: When you think of an AI-forward PC, you might think of something like NVIDIA's $3,999 DGX Spark — a computer with enough computing power to run complex large language models locally. That's not what Rabbit is trying to build with Project Cyberdeck. Instead, the company's goal is to produce a device tailored for vibe coding, and Engadget was given an exclusive first look at the upcoming PC. Rabbit began working on Project Cyberdeck after the company's CEO, Jesse Lyu, saw how much his software engineers were using Claude Code. Lyu thought a small form factor PC, like the netbooks that were popul...

item.title: Samsung cache une nouveauté matérielle majeure dans l’appareil photo du Galaxy S26 Ultra
item.description: Le dernier fleuron de la marque sud-coréenne n'a pas tout misé sur son écran « anti-espion » ou l'IA. Les premiers démontages de l'appareil révèlent l'intégration discrète d'une technologie optique inédite baptisée ALoP qui bouleverse totalement le fonctionnement de son puissant zoom.

item.title: Iran attacks oil facilities and Dubai airport as concerns mount over global energy supplies
item.description: Iranian drones hit an area near Dubai International Airport, the world’s busiest for international travel. Iran attacked commercial ships on Wednesday across the Persian Gulf and targeted Dubai International Airport, escalating a campaign of squeezing the oil-rich region as global energy concerns mounted and American and Israeli airstrikes pounded the Islamic Republic.Two Iranian drones hit near Dubai International Airport, home to the long-haul carrier Emirates and the world’s busiest for international travel. Four people were wounded but flights continued, the Dubai Media Office said.Iran’s ...

item.title: The rise of the silver collar workforce
item.description: The future of industry depends on responsible human-machine collaboration.

item.title: « Les processeurs Intel de bureau les plus rapides jamais conçus pour le jeu » : les Intel Core Ultra 250K Plus et 270K Plus sont là
item.description: Intel annonce la sortie imminente de deux nouveaux processeurs spécialement conçus pour le jeu. Que promettent les Intel Core Ultra 250K Plus et 270K Plus ?

item.title: MacBook Neo 2 : Apple prépare déjà le prochain modèle, et il y a une mauvaise nouvelle
item.description: Alors que le tout premier MacBook Neo bouscule actuellement le marché des PC portables abordables, la chaîne d'approvisionnement regarde déjà vers l'horizon. Le très bien informé Ming-Chi Kuo vient de lâcher ses dernières prédictions : abandon du tactile pour l'entrée de gamme, calendrier à rallonge pour l'OLED et ajustement des chiffres de ventes. ...

item.title: Meta didn’t buy Moltbook for bots — it bought into the agentic web
item.description: Meta’s Moltbook acquisition may look odd at first, but the deal could signal how Meta sees AI agents shaping future advertising and commerce on an agentic web.

item.title: Pourquoi cette nouvelle usine XXL à Dunkerque est vitale pour l’avenir de la voiture électrique en Europe
item.description: Orano et le groupe chinois XTC New Energy ont annoncé la construction d'une usine de matériaux dédiés aux cathodes des batteries pour voitures électriques à Dunkerque, au coeur même de la "Vallée de la batterie".

item.title: Canva’s new editing tool adds layers to AI-generated designs
item.description: Canva introduced a new feature that separates flat image files and AI-generated visuals into layered, fully editable designs. The Magic Layers tool is launching in public beta today in the US, UK, Canada, and Australia, allowing design components like objects, text boxes, and other graphics to be selected individually while preserving the original layout. "After […]...

item.title: 6 Freaky Particles That Could Fix Physics—If They Exist
item.description: The magnum opus of particle physics is far from complete, requiring physicists to devise many alternatives—some weirder than others.

item.title: This Is the Next Wave of Political Fundraising
item.description: In Discord servers and Instagram DMs, content creators are organizing, turning followings in the millions into millions of dollars in political giving.

item.title: WhatsApp is launching parent-linked accounts for pre-teens
item.description: WhatsApp is rolling out parent-managed accounts for under-13 users, limiting features to messaging and calls while giving parents PIN-protected controls, alerts, and approval over contacts and groups.

item.title: Les écouteurs Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 et Buds 4 Pro sont disponibles dès aujourd’hui en France
item.description: Les nouveaux écouteurs sans fil Galaxy Buds 4 et Buds 4 Pro arrivent ce 11 mars 2026 en France à partir de 179 euros pour le modèle standard et 249 euros pour les Pro.

item.title: Larry 'Major Nelson' Hryb joins Commodore to help build its community
item.description: Phil Spencer leaving his long-held role at Xbox might have made all the headlines last month, but a few years ago the big story was company veteran Larry "Major Nelson" Hryb’s departure from Microsoft. Hryb recently seemingly hinted at a return to the company at which he spent more than two decades, but he’s now landed at Commodore instead. The ex-Xbox icon joins the recently revived 80s computer brand as a Community Development Advisor, where his job will be to "help support and expand the global community," Commodore said in a press release. Hryb, who was the public face of Xbox during the b...
